entries.title: Deep Team Analytics
items: AI-powered team intelligence reports — personalised analysis for each squad
Bayesian player projections that account for sample size (no more misleading 4-game averages)
Monte Carlo score simulations with weekly floor/ceiling confidence intervals
Team Health Score (0-100) with component breakdown
3-year roster outlook with aging-in and aging-out projections
What-if scenario analysis (captain down, key injuries)
Actionable insights ranked by point impact

entries.title: New Branding & Player Profiles
items: New KL logo with football accent throughout the app
Data-driven player profile tags (Elite, Premium, Emerging Star etc) using 8 years of historical data
Positional scarcity factored into player valuations — a good forward is worth more than a good mid
Animated PWA splash screen on app launch
Team abbreviation fixes (WCE, WB, NM, BL)

entries.title: Scoring & Emergency Fixes
items: Fixed emergency substitutions — players scoring 0 (late outs) now correctly trigger emergency subs
Fixed player name matching for live scores (MacDonald, O'Brien etc no longer missed)
All rounds rescored to correct historical results
DNP players now shown in a separate section with emergency subs clearly labelled

entries.title: Gameday Improvements
items: Predicted scores and win probability now update when switching between games
Lock icon takes priority over injury status on player cards
Mobile gameday now shows all 23 players (was cutting off the last one)
Captain and Vice Captain badges more visible on mobile

entries.title: Security & Performance
items: Significant backend security hardening (rate limiting, session protection, input validation)
Faster page loads with intelligent caching
Player pool mobile sort options and games played display
Power rankings now exclude Round 0 and include detailed breakdowns
